data.body:
## Description

Update title-length-validator.sh to guard the v3 event-sourced path instead of the v2 flat-file path.

## What to change

File: plugins/dso/hooks/title-length-validator.sh

1. Update the path guard (line ~45):
   BEFORE: if [[ "$FILE_PATH" != *"/.tickets/"* ]]; then exit 0; fi
   AFTER: Update to match the v3 ticket event directory path

2. Update the header comment (lines 4, 11) to reference the v3 path instead of the v2 path.

## Rationale
The title-length-validator enforces Jira's 255-char limit on ticket titles. With v2 cleanup, .tickets/ no longer exists. The hook should guard the v3 path so title enforcement still works for v3 ticket writes (if any Write/Edit tool calls target that path). If the v3 system never exposes ticket titles via Write/Edit tool calls (they go through the CLI), document why and remove the guard entirely — but default to updating the path to maintain the invariant.

## TDD Requirement
Failing tests from task 014f-a652 must be green after this change.

## Files to edit
- plugins/dso/hooks/title-length-validator.sh
